hausa.build_replicate_transcribe_translate_m: Gina • Kwafa • Transcribe • Fassara • Mutate • CRISPR • Kimiyyar shari'a
hausa.a_pairs_with_t_2_bonds_g_with_c_3_wats: A yana haɗuwa da T (bond 2), G da C (3). Watson + Crick + Franklin (1953) sun warware wannan siffa daga X-ray crystallography. Wannan siffar tana nuna yadda DNA ke kwafan kansa da yadda ake karanta shi.
hausa.helicase_splits_the_strands_dna_polyme: Helicase yana raba strand; DNA polymerase yana gina strand na cikawa. Semi-conservative — kowane sabon helix yana da strand ɗaya na tsoho + ɗaya sabo. Meselson da Stahl sun tabbatar da wannan a 1958.
hausa.rna_polymerase_reads_one_dna_strand_3_: RNA polymerase yana karanta DNA strand ɗaya 3′→5′ kuma yana gina RNA 5′→3′. Haruffa iri ɗaya ne, sai dai T ya zama U. mRNA yana ɗaukar girke-girke zuwa ribosome — matakin farko na central dogma.
hausa.64_codons_20_amino_acids_the_genetic_c: codon 64 → amino acid 20 (genetic code yana da yawa). AUG yana farawa; UAA/UAG/UGA suna dakatarwa. tRNA yana karanta codon, yana kawo amino acid daidai, yana gina peptide bond.
hausa.point_mutation_one_letter_swapped_inse: Point mutation — an canza harafi ɗaya. Insertion/deletion — reading frame yana motsi, dukan protein na ƙasa yana lalacewa. Sickle cell anemia A→T ɗaya ne kawai — harafi ɗaya, tasiri na rayuwa duka.
hausa.bacterial_immune_system_repurposed_cas: An sake amfani da tsarin garkuwa na ƙwayoyin cuta. Cas9 enzyme + guide RNA = almakashi na molecule. Doudna + Charpentier sun lashe Nobel 2020. CRISPR therapy na farko (sickle cell) FDA ya amince da shi a Disamba 2023.
hausa.sequence_determines_structure_determin: Sequence yana ƙayyade tsari wanda yake ƙayyade aiki. Hemoglobin yana ɗaukar O₂, antibody suna ganewa, enzyme suna catalyze. AlphaFold (2020) ya yi hasashen tsari miliyan 200 — matsala mai shekaru 50 an warware a cikin watanni 18.
hausa.forensics_str_profiling_dna_evidence: Kimiyyar shari'a — STR profiling + shaidar DNA
hausa.codis_uses_20_short_tandem_repeat_str_: CODIS yana amfani da short tandem repeat (STR) loci 20. Yiwuwar dacewa ɗaya ce cikin quadrillion lokacin da dukan loci suka dace. Innocence Project — an soke hukunce-hukunce sama da 245 na kuskure ta hanyar gwajin DNA bayan laifi.
hausa.practice_transcription_translation_mut: Yi motsa jiki na transcription, translation, rarraba mutation. AP Bio Big Idea 3.A.1 — DNA (wani lokaci RNA) shine tushen watsa bayanan gado. NGSS HS-LS3-1.
hausa.retrieval_practice_gamified_speed_buil: Motsa jiki na dawowa — a matsayin wasa. Gudu yana gina automaticity — lokacin da duban codon table ya zama na atomatik, working memory naka yana samun 'yanci don tunani mafi girma, kamar hasashen tasirin mutation.
hausa.dna_rna_protein_with_retroviruses_hiv_: DNA → RNA → protein — ciki har da retrovirus (HIV) da ke tafiya baya ta hanyar reverse transcriptase. Crick ya ƙirƙiri kalmar "dogma" a 1957; daga baya ya ce yana nufin zato, ba gaskiya da ba za a iya musantawa ba.
hausa.pick_a_sequence_the_complementary_stra: Zaɓi sequence — ana cika strand na cikawa da base pairing (A-T, G-C). DNA na gaskiya ana gina shi haka koyaushe.
hausa.helicase_unwinds_the_helix_dna_polymer: Helicase yana buɗe helix; DNA polymerase yana karanta kowane template strand kuma yana sanya cikawarsa. Semi-conservative — kowane daughter strand yana da ɗaya na tsoho + ɗaya sabo.
hausa.rna_polymerase_reads_the_template_stra: RNA polymerase yana karanta template strand. Ka'ida iri ɗaya ta complementarity, amma T → U. Sakamako — kwafi ɗaya na mRNA na single-strand, a shirye don fita daga nucleus.
hausa.ribosome_reads_codons_3_bases_at_a_tim: Ribosome yana karanta codon (base 3 kowane lokaci). Kowane codon → amino acid ɗaya. Ana karanta genetic code a matsayin triplet mara jujjuyawa, mara waƙafi.
hausa.point_mutations_silent_no_protein_chan: Point mutation — silent (protein ba ya canzawa), missense (amino acid ɗaya ya bambanta), nonsense (dakatawa da wuri). Frameshift (insertion/deletion) sau da yawa mai lalata ne.
hausa.guide_rna_points_cas9_to_a_20_base_tar: Guide RNA yana nuna Cas9 zuwa target na 20-base. Cas9 yana yanke strand biyu. Repair pathway na tantanin halitta suna rufe gene ko ƙara template da ka bayar.
hausa.primary_sequence_secondary_helix_sheet: Primary (sequence) → secondary (α-helix, β-sheet) → tertiary (naɗewar 3D) → quaternary (multi-subunit). Canjin amino acid ɗaya na iya lalata naɗewa.
hausa.str_profiling_13_20_short_tandem_repea: STR profiling — short tandem repeat loci 13-20. Yiwuwar dacewa ta bazuwa a cikin dukan loci kimanin ɗaya cikin biliyan. Ana amfani da shi a CODIS, paternity test, da forensic lab.
hausa.a_new_dna_puzzle_every_session_transla: Sabon puzzle na DNA kowane session. Fassara, gano mutation, nemo ORF ko warware wani forensic case. Streak counter yana bin nasarar yau da kullum.
hausa.speed_translation_duel_decode_codons_f: Gasar gudu na fassara. Decode codon da sauri kana gasa da agogo. Gwada ko genetic code yana cikin kwakwalwarka, ba a reference card kaɗai ba.
hausa.codon_table_base_pairing_rules_key_ter: Codon table, ka'idodin base pairing, mahimman kalmomi (ORF, intron, exon, promoter, repressor) — cheat sheet da za ka iya sake dubawa akai-akai.
hausa.mrna_is_a_copy_of_the_coding_strand_wi: 💡 mRNA kwafi ne na coding strand inda U ke ɗaukar wurin T. (RNA polymerase yana karanta complementary template strand 3'→5', yana ba da sequence iri ɗaya da coding strand.)
hausa.no_pam_sites_ngg_found_try_a_different: ⚠️ Ba a sami PAM site (NGG) ba. Gwada wani DNA sequence daban daga Build tab.
hausa.double_strand_break_created_choose_rep: ✂️ An ƙirƙiri double-strand break! Zaɓi repair pathway:
hausa.crispr_clustered_regularly_interspaced: CRISPR (Clustered Regularly Interspaced Short Palindromic Repeats) wata gene-editing technology ce da ta samo asali daga kariyar garkuwa ta ƙwayoyin cuta.
hausa.a_20nt_rna_that_directs_cas9_to_the_ta: — RNA na ~20nt da ke jagorantar Cas9 zuwa target
hausa.protospacer_adjacent_motif_ngg_require: — Protospacer Adjacent Motif (NGG). Ana buƙata don binding.
hausa.gene_therapy_sickle_cell_casgevy_cance: Gene therapy (sickle cell → CASGEVY™), cancer immunotherapy, injiniyan amfanin gona, samfuran cututtuka.
hausa.ala_val_leu_ile_pro_phe_trp_met_gly: Ala, Val, Leu, Ile, Pro, Phe, Trp, Met, Gly
hausa.ser_thr_cys_tyr_asn_gln: Ser, Thr, Cys, Tyr, Asn, Gln
hausa.run_transcription_and_translation_firs: Gudanar da Transcription da Translation da farko!
hausa.predict_the_effect_type_from_5_options: Yi hasashen nau'in tasiri daga zaɓuɓɓuka 5.
hausa.10_mutation_vignettes_each_shows_a_sho: Mutation vignette 10. Kowanne yana nuna gajeren DNA sequence kafin/bayan yana haskaka canjin. Zaɓi nau'in tasiri — silent, missense, nonsense, frameshift, ko in-frame indel. Bayan zaɓi, coaching yana bayanin dalilin da ya sa wannan tasiri ya fi yiwuwa fiye da sauran.
hausa.polar_hydroxyl_side_chain_often_phosph: Polar, hydroxyl side chain. Sau da yawa phosphorylated.
hausa.polar_hydroxyl_often_phosphorylated: Polar, hydroxyl. Sau da yawa phosphorylated.
hausa.forms_disulfide_bonds_s_s_critical_for: Yana gina disulfide bond (S-S). Mahimmanci ga protein folding.
hausa.aromatic_hydrophobic_largest_amino_aci: Aromatic, hydrophobic. amino acid mafi girma.
hausa.rigid_ring_disrupts_helices: Ring mai ƙarfi. Yana ɓata α-helix.
hausa.basic_side_chain_active_site_of_many_e: Basic side chain. active site na enzyme da yawa (pKa ~7).
hausa.polar_amide_often_surface_exposed: Polar amide. Sau da yawa surface-exposed.
hausa.polar_amide_common_n_glycosylation_sit: Polar amide. N-glycosylation site na kowa.
hausa.basic_long_side_chain_often_acetylated: Basic, long side chain. Sau da yawa acetylated/methylated.
hausa.basic_guanidinium_group_6_codons_most_: Basic, guanidinium group. codon 6 — mafi degenerate.
hausa.acidic_often_active_site_nucleophile: Acidic. Sau da yawa active-site nucleophile.
hausa.acidic_most_abundant_in_proteins: Acidic. Mafi yawa a cikin protein.
hausa.smallest_no_side_chain_high_flexibilit: Mafi ƙanƙanta. Babu side chain — flexibility mai girma.
hausa.helicase_unwinds_the_double_helix_at_o: Helicase yana buɗe double helix a replication origin. Single-strand binding protein suna hana re-annealing. Topoisomerase yana rage supercoil tension a gaban fork.
hausa.primase_lays_down_short_10_nt_rna_prim: Primase yana sanya gajeren RNA primer (~10 nt) — DNA polymerase yana buƙatar 3'-OH don extend, don haka ba zai iya fara sabon strand da kansa ba.
hausa.synthesized_continuously_5_3_in_the_sa: Ana synthesize shi ba tare da tsayawa ba 5'→3' a hanya ɗaya da replication fork ke motsi. primer ɗaya ga kowane origin.
hausa.synthesized_in_short_100_1000_nt_fragm: Ana synthesize shi a matsayin gajeren fragment 100-1000 nt (Okazaki fragment) domin polymerase yana iya extend 5'→3' kawai. Kowane fragment yana buƙatar primer nasa.
hausa.rna_primers_are_excised_and_replaced_w: Ana yanke RNA primer kuma a maye gurbinsu da DNA nucleotide.
hausa.joins_okazaki_fragments_by_forming_the: Yana haɗa Okazaki fragment ta hanyar gina phosphodiester bond na ƙarshe.
hausa.polymerase_checks_each_base_mismatches: Polymerase yana duba kowane base; ana cire mismatch a maye gurbinsu. Yana rage error rate daga ~10⁻⁵ zuwa ~10⁻⁷.
hausa.catches_the_few_mismatches_that_escape: Yana kama 'yan mismatch ɗin da suka tsere daga proofreading. error rate na ƙarshe — ~10⁻¹⁰ ga kowane base pair.
hausa.rna_polymerase_binds_the_promoter_e_g_: RNA polymerase yana haɗuwa da promoter (misali TATA box ~25 bp upstream na transcription start). Yana taimakawa melt DNA double helix.
hausa.polymerase_reads_template_strand_3_5_s: Polymerase yana karanta template strand 3'→5' kuma yana synthesize mRNA 5'→3'. A cikin ƙwayoyin cuta yana ƙara ~nucleotide 30 kowane daƙiƙa; ~10-50 a cikin eukaryote.
hausa.bacteria_rho_dependent_or_intrinsic_te: Ƙwayoyin cuta — rho-dependent ko intrinsic termination (hairpin loop). Eukaryote — cleavage da polyadenylation signal.
hausa.7_methylguanosine_cap_added_to_5_end_h: Ana ƙara 7-methylguanosine cap a 5' end. Yana taimakawa ribosome gane mRNA + kare daga degradation.
hausa.introns_removed_exons_joined_by_the_sp: Ana cire intron, ana haɗa exon da spliceosome. Alternative splicing → protein da yawa daga gene ɗaya.
hausa.100_250_adenine_nucleotides_added_to_3: Ana ƙara adenine nucleotide ~100-250 a 3' end. Yana daidaita mRNA + yana nuna export nasa.
hausa.mature_mrna_exits_through_nuclear_pore: mRNA da ya nuna yana fita ta nuclear pore zuwa cytoplasm.
hausa.small_ribosomal_subunit_binds_mrna_ini: Small ribosomal subunit yana haɗuwa da mRNA. Initiator tRNA (yana ɗaukar Met) yana haɗuwa da start codon AUG. Large subunit yana shiga.
hausa.each_cycle_aminoacyl_trna_enters_a_sit: Kowane zagaye — aminoacyl-tRNA yana shiga A site → ana gina peptide bond (23S rRNA ne ya catalyze, ribozyme) → ribosome yana motsa codon ɗaya → tRNA yana zuwa A→P→E.
hausa.stop_codon_uaa_uag_uga_recognized_by_r: Stop codon (UAA/UAG/UGA) release factor yana gane su. Ana sakin peptide, ribosome yana rabuwa.
hausa.chaperones_hsp70_groel_help_proteins_f: Chaperone (Hsp70, GroEL) suna taimakawa protein naɗe daidai. Post-translational modification — phosphorylation, glycosylation, cleavage, disulfide bond.
hausa.codon_changes_but_amino_acid_is_the_sa: Codon yana canzawa, amma amino acid iri ɗaya ne (genetic code redundancy). Babu tasiri.
hausa.codon_changes_different_amino_acid_eff: Codon yana canzawa → amino acid daban. Tasiri daga babu (conservative substitution) zuwa mai tsanani (sickle cell — Glu→Val).
hausa.codon_changes_stop_codon_truncated_pro: Codon yana canzawa → STOP codon. Ana yanke protein, sau da yawa non-functional.
hausa.adds_nucleotide_s_if_not_a_multiple_of: Yana ƙara nucleotide. Idan ba multiple na 3 ba, reading frame yana motsi → dukan codon na ƙasa suna canzawa. Sau da yawa mai tsanani.
hausa.removes_nucleotide_s_same_frameshift_c: Yana cire nucleotide. Sakamakon frameshift iri ɗaya da insertion.
hausa.extra_copies_of_a_gene_or_region_can_l: Ƙarin kwafi na gene ko yanki. Suna iya kawo dosage effect (Down syndrome = ƙarin chromosome 21).
hausa.segment_of_chromosome_flipped_may_disr: An juya sashin chromosome. Yana iya ɓata gene a breakpoint.
hausa.segment_moves_to_a_different_chromosom: Sashi yana motsa zuwa wani chromosome daban. Sananne — Philadelphia chromosome (CML; BCR-ABL fusion).
hausa.repeating_unit_e_g_cag_expands_across_: Rukunin da ke maimaituwa (misali CAG) yana faɗaɗa a tsakanin tsararraki. Huntington (CAG a HTT), fragile X (CGG a FMR1), myotonic dystrophy.
hausa.pairs_1_22_numbered_roughly_by_size_wi: Nau'i-nau'i 1-22 (an lissafta kimanin ta girma, tare da keɓancewa — chr. 21 ya fi chr. 22 ƙanƙanta).
hausa.xx_female_or_xy_male_y_is_much_smaller: XX (mace) ko XY (namiji). Y ya fi ƙanƙanta sosai, yana ɗaukar gene kaɗan (~70) idan aka kwatanta da X (~800).
hausa.23_pairs_diploid_in_somatic_cells_game: Nau'i 23 (diploid a somatic cell). Gamete haploid ne (chromosome 23, babu nau'i).
hausa.surprisingly_few_many_genes_produce_mu: Kaɗan da ban mamaki — gene da yawa suna samar da protein da yawa ta alternative splicing. Yawancin genome regulatory ne ko non-coding.
hausa.if_stretched_out_1_8_m_of_dna_per_cell: Idan an mike, ~1.8 m na DNA ga kowace cell. Ana cusa shi a cikin nucleus na ~10 µm ta histone + supercoiling.
hausa.maternally_inherited_codes_for_37_gene: Ana gada shi daga uwa. Yana code gene 37 (protein 13, tRNA 22, rRNA 2). Kwafi da yawa ga kowane mitochondrion.
hausa.amplifies_a_specific_dna_segment_by_2_: Yana ƙara wani DNA segment na musamman da 2ⁿ (zagaye n). Yana amfani da Taq polymerase mai jurewar zafi. Tushen molecular biology na zamani.
hausa.reads_dna_sequence_using_chain_termina: Yana karanta DNA sequence ta amfani da chain-terminating dideoxynucleotide. Read length ~800-1000 bp. Yanzu sau da yawa an maye gurbinsa da next-generation sequencing.
hausa.massively_parallel_sequences_millions_: Massively parallel — yana sequence miliyoyin fragment a lokaci ɗaya. Illumina yana mulki. Read length ~100-300 bp, biliyoyin ga kowane run.
hausa.programmable_gene_editing_guide_rna_ta: Programmable gene editing. Guide RNA yana jagorantar nuclease Cas9 zuwa DNA na musamman. Cut yana yin gene knockout ko HDR-mediated insertion. Nobel 2020.
hausa.edits_a_single_base_without_double_str: Yana gyara base guda ba tare da double-strand break ba. off-target effect kaɗan fiye da Cas9.
hausa.bacterial_proteins_that_cut_dna_at_spe: Protein na ƙwayoyin cuta da ke yanke DNA a sequence na musamman na 4-8 bp. Sun ba da damar recombinant DNA technology. Nobel 1978.
hausa.joins_dna_fragments_via_phosphodiester: Yana haɗa DNA fragment ta phosphodiester bond. T4 DNA ligase shine cloning workhorse.
hausa.separates_dna_fragments_by_size_in_an_: Yana raba DNA fragment ta girma a electric field. fragment ƙanana suna motsi da sauri a gel matrix.
hausa.thousands_of_dna_probes_on_a_chip_meas: Dubban DNA probe a chip. Yana auna gene expression ko detect SNP a parallel.
hausa.sequences_mrna_from_individual_cells_r: Yana sequence mRNA daga cell ɗaya-ɗaya. Yana bayyana cell-type heterogeneity da bulk RNA-seq ke rasa.
hausa.near_atomic_structures_of_rna_dna_comp: Tsari na near-atomic na RNA/DNA complex ba tare da crystallization ba. Mai ƙarfi ga ribosome, spliceosome, replisome.
hausa.read_lengths_up_to_100kb_vs_illumina_s: Read length har zuwa 100 kb+ (da ~300 bp na Illumina). Ya fi kyau ga structural variant, repeat, full-length transcript.
hausa.differential_reproduction_based_on_her: Haihuwa daban dangane da variation da ake iya gado. Gene da ke inganta survival/reproduction suna zama gama-gari a tsararraki.
hausa.random_source_of_new_genetic_variation: Tushen bazuwa na sabon genetic variation. Sau da yawa neutral ko cutarwa; da wuya mai amfani. substrate na selection.
hausa.random_changes_in_allele_frequency_esp: Canje-canje na bazuwa a allele frequency, musamman a population ƙanana. Founder effect + bottleneck misalai ne masu tsanani.
hausa.movement_of_alleles_between_population: Motsi na allele tsakanin population ta migration. Yana rage bambanci tsakanin population; yana ƙara diversity a cikin population.
hausa.formation_of_new_species_usually_via_r: Samuwar sabon species, yawanci ta reproductive isolation. Allopatric (rabuwa ta yanki) shine mafi yawa.
hausa.unrelated_organisms_evolve_similar_tra: Halittu marasa alaƙa suna evolve halaye iri ɗaya da kansu (fikafikai a tsuntsaye, jemage, kwari; ido a vertebrate + cephalopod).
hausa.all_life_shares_a_common_ancestor_luca: Duk rayuwa suna raba kakannin gama gari (LUCA). Shaida — genetic code, ribosome, ATP, glycolysis, biochemistry na asali da ake rabawa.
hausa.diagram_showing_evolutionary_relations: Zane da ke nuna alaƙar evolution. Ana gina shi sosai daga kwatancin DNA sequence maimakon morphology.
hausa.allele_frequencies_stay_constant_under: allele frequency yana kasancewa tsayayye a ƙarƙashin zato na no-evolution — population mai girma, random mating, babu selection/mutation/migration/drift. p² + 2pq + q² = 1.
hausa.interactive_references_pick_a_topic_be: Nassoshi masu hulɗa — zaɓi batu a ƙasa don bincike.
hausa.five_nitrogenous_bases_make_up_dna_rna: nitrogenous base biyar suna yin DNA + RNA — A, T, G, C (DNA); A, U, G, C (RNA). Purine (A, G) suna da ring 2; pyrimidine (T, U, C) suna da 1. Pairing bisa H-bond pattern na musamman.
hausa.64_codons_4_encode_20_amino_acids_3_st: codon 64 (4³) suna code amino acid 20 + stop signal 3. Code yana da yawa (degenerate) — yawancin amino acid suna da codon da yawa, sau da yawa daban a matsayi na uku ("wobble"). Universal a kusan dukan rayuwa.
hausa.third_codon_position_pairs_less_strict: Matsayi na uku na codon yana haɗuwa da ƙarancin tsauri — tRNA ɗaya yana iya gane codon da yawa. Yana rage adadin tRNA da ake buƙata (cell yana da ~30-40, ba 64 ba).
hausa.semi_conservative_each_new_helix_has_o: Semi-conservative — kowane sabon helix yana da parental ɗaya + newly-synthesized strand ɗaya. Meselson-Stahl sun nuna a 1958. ~50 bp/daƙiƙa a ƙwayoyin cuta; ~50 bp/daƙiƙa ga kowane fork a eukaryote (amma dubban fork parallel).
hausa.rna_polymerase_reads_dna_template_3_5_: RNA polymerase yana karanta DNA template (3'→5') kuma yana synthesize mRNA (5'→3'). A eukaryote, ana process primary transcript sosai kafin export.
hausa.ribosome_reads_mrna_in_3_base_codons_a: Ribosome yana karanta mRNA a matsayin 3-base codon kuma yana gina protein. ~10-20 amino acid/daƙiƙa a ƙwayoyin cuta; ~3-5 a eukaryote. Ribosome da yawa suna iya translate mRNA ɗaya (polyribosome).
hausa.mutations_range_from_invisible_silent_: Mutation suna daga marasa gani (silent) zuwa masu kisa. Tasirinsu ya dogara da abin da ya canza, ina, da a wane cell type.
hausa.a_sampling_of_well_characterized_genet: Samfurin cututtukan gado da aka bayyana sosai. Albarkatun genetic counseling da therapy na yanzu suna tasowa — don yanke shawara na clinical duba littattafai na yanzu.
hausa.family_a_three_generations_blue_eyes: Iyali A — tsararraki uku, idanu shuɗi
hausa.two_unaffected_parents_gen_i_have_one_: Iyaye biyu marasa cutarwa (gen. I) suna da yaro ɗaya mai cutarwa + ɗaya mara cutarwa (gen. II). Yaro mai cutarwa + abokin mara cutarwa suna da ɗaya mai cutarwa + ɗaya mara cutarwa (gen. III). Halin yana bayyana a kimanin 25% na yara daga cross na marasa cutarwa.
hausa.trait_skips_generations_unaffected_par: Halin yana tsallake tsararraki (iyaye marasa cutarwa → yaro mai cutarwa).
hausa.parents_must_be_heterozygous_carriers_: Iyaye dole su zama heterozygous carrier waɗanda kowanne yana ba da recessive allele ɗaya.
hausa.affected_individuals_appear_in_both_se: Mutane masu cutarwa suna bayyana a jinsi biyu da frequency kimanin daidai.
hausa.affected_aa_homozygous_carriers_aa_are: Masu cutarwa = aa homozygous; carrier (Aa) phenotypically marasa cutarwa ne.
hausa.family_b_color_blindness_across_three_: Iyali B — makanta launi a tsararraki uku
hausa.affected_grandfather_gen_i_has_unaffec: Kaka mai cutarwa (gen. I) yana da 'ya mace mara cutarwa (gen. II) da jika mai cutarwa ta wannan 'ya (gen. III). Babu ɗa mai cutarwa daga uba mara cutarwa. Halin yana bayyana sosai a maza.
hausa.trait_shows_strong_male_bias_hemizygou: Halin yana nuna male bias mai ƙarfi (hemizygous maza suna bayyana shi; mata suna buƙatar kwafi 2).
hausa.unaffected_daughter_of_affected_grandf: 'Ya mace mara cutarwa ta kaka mai cutarwa carrier ce ta tilas.
hausa.trait_skips_generation_through_carrier: Halin yana tsallake tsara ta 'ya mace carrier, sannan ya sake bayyana a jika.
hausa.no_father_to_son_transmission_sons_inh: Babu father-to-son transmission ('ya'ya maza suna gado Y daga uba, ba X ba).
hausa.family_c_huntington_like_late_onset_tr: Iyali C — hali mai farawa a makara kamar Huntington
hausa.every_affected_individual_has_at_least: Kowane mutum mai cutarwa yana da aƙalla iyaye ɗaya mai cutarwa. Halin yana bayyana a kowace tsara. ~50% na yara daga iyaye masu cutarwa suna da cutarwa. Daidai a maza + mata.
hausa.trait_appears_in_every_generation_no_s: Halin yana bayyana a kowace tsara (ba ya tsallake).
hausa.every_affected_individual_has_at_least_2: Kowane mutum mai cutarwa yana da aƙalla iyaye ɗaya mai cutarwa.
hausa.roughly_50_of_children_of_an_affected_: ~50% na yara na heterozygote mai cutarwa suna da cutarwa.
hausa.equal_frequency_in_males_females_autos: frequency daidai a maza + mata — autosomal, ba sex-linked ba.
hausa.inheritance_pattern_reasoning_ranking_: Inheritance pattern + reasoning ranking — dole a tabbatar da su biyu kafin reveal. Reveal yana ba da maki ga ranking naka mataki-mataki, ba amsarka ta ƙarshe kaɗai ba. Bincike na gaskiya yana buƙatar ka san dalilin, ba kawai me ba.
hausa.2_rank_these_explanations_most_least_s: 2. Tsara waɗannan bayanai (mafi yawa → mafi ƙaranci na tallafi):
hausa.notice_the_ranking_grade_is_independen: Lura — ranking grade yana da 'yanci daga pattern grade — kana iya sanin me ke daidai amma ka tsara dalilin da tsari mara kyau.
hausa.during_gamete_formation_the_two_allele: Yayin samuwar gamete, allele biyu na kowane gene suna rabuwa, don kowane gamete ya ɗauki allele ɗaya.
hausa.alleles_for_different_genes_assort_ind: allele na gene daban-daban suna assort da kansu daga juna yayin samuwar gamete (gene a chromosome daban).
hausa.when_two_different_alleles_are_present: Lokacin da allele biyu daban suke, ɗaya (dominant) yana bayyana yayin da ɗaya (recessive) ya ɓoye.
hausa.methyl_group_ch_added_to_cytosines_esp: Ana ƙara methyl group (–CH₃) a cytosine, musamman a CpG island. Sau da yawa yana yin shiru ga gene expression.
hausa.acetylation_methylation_phosphorylatio: Acetylation, methylation, phosphorylation na histone tail. Yana canza chromatin packaging.
hausa.atp_dependent_complexes_slide_or_eject: ATP-dependent complex suna zamewa ko fitar da nucleosome don bayyana DNA.
hausa.mirna_lncrna_regulate_gene_expression_: miRNA, lncRNA suna sarrafa gene expression a post-transcriptionally.
hausa.some_genes_expressed_only_from_materna: Wasu gene suna bayyana daga maternal ko paternal allele kawai. Methylation mark.
hausa.some_epigenetic_marks_survive_gametoge: Wasu epigenetic mark suna tsira daga gametogenesis kuma su wuce zuwa offspring.
hausa.who_can_access_your_genome_gina_2008_u: Wa zai iya samun damar genome naka? GINA (2008, US) yana hana genetic discrimination a aiki + health insurance, amma ba a life insurance ba.
hausa.23andme_ancestrydna_reveal_ancestry_he: 23andMe, AncestryDNA suna bayyana ancestry + health risk. Damuwa — incidental finding, daidaito, raba data da third party.
hausa.in_2018_he_jiankui_edited_embryos_for_: A 2018 He Jiankui ya gyara embryo don HIV resistance → aka haifi tagwaye. An yi Allah wadai da shi sosai. Yawancin ƙasashe suna hana germline editing.
hausa.hypothetical_selection_or_editing_of_e: Zaɓi ko gyara na hasashe na embryo don halaye marasa likita (tsawo, IQ). A yanzu yana da iyaka na fasaha; mai jayayya a ɗabi'a.
hausa.engineered_to_spread_through_wild_popu: An injiniya don yaɗuwa ta wild population (misali malaria resistance a sauro). Ecological rashin juyawa yana iya faruwa.
hausa.should_we_test_for_untreatable_disease: Ya kamata mu test cututtukan da ba za a iya magani ba (Huntington)? Wasu suna zaɓar rashin sani.
hausa.familial_dna_searches_solved_cold_case: Familial DNA search sun warware cold case (Golden State Killer, 2018) amma suna tayar da tambayoyi game da privacy na dangi da ba su yarda ba.
hausa.us_supreme_court_2013_ruled_that_natur: US Supreme Court (2013) ya yanke hukunci cewa DNA na halitta ba za a iya patent ba, amma synthetic cDNA za a iya.
hausa.reference_genomes_historically_eurocen: Reference genome a tarihi Eurocentric ne. Ƙoƙarin inganta reference diversity yana ci gaba (misali human pangenome project).
hausa.genome_size_does_not_correlate_with_or: Girman genome bai yi daidai da rikitarwa na organism ba (C-value paradox). Mutum yana da gene count kamar roundworm — yawancin DNA na "ƙari" a genome mai girma non-coding ne.
hausa.heritable_changes_in_gene_expression_t: Canje-canje da ake iya gado a gene expression ba tare da canjin DNA sequence ba. Muhalli, abinci mai gina jiki, damuwa suna tasiri.
hausa.building_blocks_of_proteins_9_are_esse: Abubuwan gina protein. 9 "essential" ne (ba za a iya synthesize ba — dole a samu daga abinci) — His, Ile, Leu, Lys, Met, Phe, Thr, Trp, Val.
hausa.essentially_no_beneficial_fixation_exp: A zahiri babu beneficial fixation da ake tsammani. Population na cikin mutation-selection balance ko drift kawai.
hausa.drift_dominates_few_expected_fixations: Drift yana mulki — fixation kaɗan da ake tsammani, ko da mutation na faruwa. Kowa a population ƙanana.
hausa.a_handful_of_beneficial_mutations_expe: Ana tsammanin beneficial mutation kaɗan su fixed. Ma'auni ga yawancin population na halitta.
hausa.many_fixations_expected_strong_selecti: Ana tsammanin fixation da yawa — strong selection, population mai girma, ko duka biyu. Misali antibiotic resistance na ƙwayoyin cuta.
hausa.extreme_regime_viruses_cancer_cell_lin: Regime mai tsanani — virus, cancer cell line, asexual lab population. adaptive sweep da yawa a lokaci ɗaya.
hausa.mutation_inquiry_drift_selection_fixat: 🔬 Bincike na mutation — Drift, Selection, Fixation
hausa.set_per_base_mutation_rate_population_: Saita per-base mutation rate, population size, generation, da selection coefficient. Yi hasashen nawa beneficial mutation ne ke fixed da gaske. Babu score, babu reveal.
hausa.log_n_vs_log_circles_typical_regimes: log₁₀(N) vs. log₁₀(μ) — da'ira = regime na yau da kullum
hausa.your_hypothesis_which_slider_has_the_b: Hasashenka (wane slider ne ke da tasiri mafi girma kan fixation rate? Me ya sa?)
hausa.e_g_selection_has_more_leverage_than_o: misali selection yana da leverage fiye da μ lokacin da N ya isa girma...
hausa.when_does_the_regime_move_from_drift_d: Yaushe regime ke motsa daga drift-dominated zuwa selection-dominated? Me N·s ke gaya maka?
hausa.why_are_antibiotic_resistance_and_vira: Me ya sa antibiotic resistance da viral evolution suke da sauri sosai — wane slider ne a matsayinsa mafi tsanani?
hausa.a_neutral_mutation_s_0_has_fixation_pr: neutral mutation (s = 0) yana da fixation probability 1/(2N). Menene ma'anar hakan ga large population?
hausa.could_the_same_population_size_be_drif: Shin population size iri ɗaya na iya zama "drift-dominated" ga weak mutation da "selection-dominated" ga strong a lokaci ɗaya?
hausa.i_can_explain_why_this_n_g_s_combinati: Zan iya bayanin dalilin da wannan haɗin μ × N × g × s ke ƙirƙirar wannan regime.
hausa.inquiry_widget_no_score_no_reveal_no_a: Inquiry widget — babu score, babu reveal, babu answer dump. Yana amfani da Kimura full diploid fixation formula (1962) (1−e^(−2s))/(1−e^(−4Ns)), wanda ke interpolate tsakanin Haldane ~2s a strong-selection limit (Ns≫1) da neutral 1/(2N) a drift limit (Ns≪1 ko s=0).
hausa.more_than_humans_20_000_many_novel_gen: Fiye da mutane (~20,000). gene novel da yawa ga sensory perception + cognition.
hausa.special_protein_dsup_wraps_dna_protect: Protein na musamman (Dsup) yana lulluɓe DNA yana kare shi daga lalacewar X-ray. Bincike don radiotherapy application.
hausa.hypersensitive_contact_inhibition_high: Hypersensitive contact inhibition + high-molecular-weight hyaluronan. Cancer ba safai ba ne.
hausa.elephants_have_20_copies_of_tumor_supp: Giwaye suna da kwafi ~20 na tumor suppressor TP53 (mutane suna da 1). Bayani mai yiwuwa ga ƙarancin cancer rate duk da cell count mai girma.
hausa.axolotl_can_regrow_limbs_spinal_cord_h: Axolotl na iya sake girma gaɓoɓi, spinal cord, zuciya, har sassan kwakwalwa. Bincike don regenerative medicine.
hausa.stores_fat_not_water_myth_allows_survi: Yana ajiye kitse, ba ruwa ba (ƙarya). Yana ba da damar tsira makonni ba tare da abinci ba. Ana samun ruwa daga sha + metabolic byproduct.
hausa.population_crashed_12_000_years_ago_ge: Population ya faɗi ~shekaru 12,000 da suka wuce. Genetic bottleneck → diversity mai ƙaranci sosai. Kowace cheetah genetically kusan tagwaye.
hausa.modern_whales_descended_from_land_mamm: Whale na zamani sun samo asali daga dabbobi masu shayarwa na ƙasa (~shekaru miliyan 50 da suka wuce). Danginsu mafi kusa mai rai — dorinar ruwa. Vestigial pelvic bone har yanzu suna nan.
hausa.wide_variation_adder_s_tongue_fern_720: Bambanci mai fadi. Adder's-tongue fern — nau'i ~720 (mafi yawa da aka rubuta). Shinkafa — nau'i 12. Mutum — nau'i 23.
hausa.all_female_asexual_for_80_million_year: Duka mata, asexual na ~shekaru miliyan 80. Suna samun gene daga wasu species (HGT) maimakon bambanci ta sex.
hausa.lobe_finned_fish_thought_extinct_since: Kifin lobe-finned da aka yi tunanin ya mutu tun zamanin dinosaur. An sami samfuran rayayye a 1938. Zuriyya ~shekaru miliyan 400.
hausa.blue_copper_based_hemocyanin_detects_b: Shuɗi (copper-based hemocyanin). Yana detect bacterial endotoxin — ana amfani da shi don test vaccine + medical device.
hausa.diverged_from_brown_bears_150_000_500_: Sun rabu da brown bear ~shekaru 150,000-500,000 da suka wuce. An tabbatar da wasu grizzly-polar hybrid ("pizzly" ko "grolar") a daji.
hausa.dog_breed_genetics_wild_dna_facts: 🐕 Genetics na nau'in kare + bayanan DNA na daji
hausa.wild_dna_biology_trivia: DNA na daji + trivia na biology
hausa.hormones_travel_through_the_bloodstrea: Hormone suna tafiya ta hanyar jini don yin aiki a target tissue masu nisa. Suna daidaita metabolism, girma, haihuwa, stress response, da homeostasis.
hausa.approximate_elemental_composition_of_t: Kimanin abubuwan da ke tattare da jikin mutum ta mass. Abubuwa 11 kawai ke >99%. CHNOPS (C, H, N, O, P, S) suna yin kusan dukan organic molecule.
hausa.recent_extinctions_mostly_human_caused: Mutuwar species na baya-bayan nan (galibi mutum ke haddasawa) + mutuwar species na zamanin da masu shahara. Duniya ta yi mass extinction 5 — da yawa suna cewa muna cikin na 6 yanzu.
hausa.6co_6h_o_light_c_h_o_6o_powered_by_chl: 6CO₂ + 6H₂O + haske → C₆H₁₂O₆ + 6O₂. Chlorophyll ne ke tafiyar da shi. Tushen mafi yawan oxygen na sararin samaniya.
hausa.c3_most_plants_c4_corn_sugarcane_effic: C3 (yawancin shuke-shuke), C4 (masara, rake — mai inganci a T mai zafi), CAM (cactus, succulent — suna buɗe stomata da dare don ajiye ruwa).
hausa.tiny_pores_on_leaves_let_co_in_o_water: Ƙananan ramuka a ganye. Suna barin CO₂ ciki + O₂/ruwa waje. Suna buɗewa/rufewa dangane da haske, ruwa, CO₂.
hausa.carries_water_minerals_up_from_roots_d: Yana ɗaukar ruwa + ma'adanai sama daga tushen. Cell sun mutu. Yana ƙirƙirar transpiration pull.
hausa.carries_sugars_from_leaves_to_rest_of_: Yana ɗaukar sukari daga ganye zuwa sauran shukar. Cell suna raye. Hanya biyu.
hausa.plant_hormone_phototropism_growing_tow: Hormone na shuka. Phototropism (girma zuwa haske). concentration a gefen inuwa → cell suna tsayi → suna lanƙwasa zuwa haske.
hausa.gas_hormone_ripens_fruit_why_ripe_bana: Hormone na gas. Yana nunar 'ya'yan itace. Me ya sa nunannen ayaba ke nunar da wasu 'ya'yan itace. Stress signaling.
hausa.promotes_stem_elongation_seed_germinat: Yana inganta tsawon kara, tsirar iri, fulawa.
hausa.promotes_cell_division_delays_leaf_sen: Yana inganta cell division. Yana jinkirta tsufan ganye.
hausa.stress_hormone_closes_stomata_when_wat: Hormone na stress. Yana rufe stomata lokacin da ruwa ya yi ƙaranci. Yana inganta barcin iri.
hausa.angiosperm_unique_one_sperm_fertilizes: Angiosperm na musamman ne — sperm ɗaya yana takin egg cell (embryo), ɗayan yana takin polar nuclei (endosperm — abinci ga iri).
hausa.flower_shape_color_scent_match_pollina: Siffar fure, launi, ƙamshi, sun dace da abin da pollinator ke so. Wasu specialized sosai (orchid + wani asu na musamman).
hausa.evolved_in_nutrient_poor_soils_venus_f: Sun evolve a ƙasa mai talaucin abinci mai gina jiki. Venus flytrap (snap trap), pitcher plant (pitfall trap), sundew (mai manne).
hausa.symbiosis_with_fungi_fungi_extend_root: Symbiosis da fungi. Fungi suna faɗaɗa isar tushen; shuka yana ba da sukari. ~85% na plant species.
hausa.rhizobium_bacteria_in_root_nodules_con: Rhizobium bacteria a root nodule, suna canza N₂ → NH₃. Shi ya sa wake + wake suke da protein mai yawa + suna inganta ƙasa.
hausa.domestication_selected_larger_seeds_wh: Cin gida ya zaɓi iri manya (shinkafa), waɗanda ba sa faɗuwa (alkama), 'ya'yan itace masu zaƙi (apple). Kwanan nan — hybrid corn, GMO, marker-assisted selection.
hausa.common_in_plants_rare_in_animals_wheat: Na kowa a shuke-shuke (ba safai a dabbobi ba). Alkama hexaploid ne (set 6), strawberry octoploid. Sau da yawa yana ƙara vigor + yield.
hausa.stiffening_compound_in_cell_walls_of_w: Sinadari mai ƙarfafawa a bangon cell na itace. Shi ya sa itace ke da ƙarfi + yana ruɓewa a hankali.
hausa.individuals_of_one_species_in_an_area: Mutane na species ɗaya a yanki.
hausa.all_populations_interacting_in_an_area: Dukan population da ke hulɗa a yanki.
hausa.all_ecosystems_on_earth_the_zone_of_li: Dukan ecosystem a duniya. Yankin rayuwa.
hausa.role_of_a_species_in_its_ecosystem_two: Rawar species a cikin ecosystem nasa. species biyu ba za su iya mamaye niche ɗaya ba (competitive exclusion).
hausa.physical_place_where_an_organism_lives: Wurin zahiri inda organism ke rayuwa.
hausa.network_of_who_eats_whom_trophic_level: Cibiyar wa ke cin wa. Trophic level — producer → primary consumer → secondary → da sauransu.
hausa.make_own_food_plants_algae_some_bacter: Suna yin abincinsu. Shuke-shuke, algae, wasu ƙwayoyin cuta. Tushen food chain.
hausa.get_food_by_eating_others_herbivores_c: Suna samun abinci ta cin wasu. Herbivore, carnivore, omnivore.
hausa.break_down_dead_matter_fungi_bacteria_: Suna rusa abubuwan da suka mutu. Fungi, ƙwayoyin cuta, decomposer. Suna recycle abinci mai gina jiki.
hausa.close_interaction_between_species_mutu: Hulɗa ta kusa tsakanin species. Mutualism (+/+), commensalism (+/0), parasitism (+/−).
hausa.disproportionate_effect_on_ecosystem_d: Tasiri mara daidaito kan ecosystem duk da ƙarancin adadi. Otter na teku suna sarrafa sea urchin, waɗanda ke sarrafa kelp.
hausa.maximum_population_size_environment_ca: Population size mafi girma da muhalli ke iya ɗauka. Resource, predation, disease suna iyakance K.
hausa.population_grows_at_constant_rate_dn_d: Population yana girma a saurin tsayayye. dN/dt = rN. Ba zai iya ci gaba har abada ba.
hausa.growth_slows_as_n_approaches_k_dn_dt_r: Girma yana raguwa yayin da N ke kusanci K. dN/dt = rN(K-N)/K. curve na siffar S.
hausa.many_offspring_little_parental_care_sh: Zuriyya da yawa, ƙarancin kula da iyaye, gajeriyar rayuwa. Kwari, ciyawa. Boom-and-bust.
hausa.few_offspring_lots_of_care_long_lived_: Zuriyya kaɗan, kula mai yawa, dogon rayuwa. Whale, mutane, itacen oak.
hausa.predictable_changes_in_community_over_: Canje-canje da ake iya hasashe a al'umma cikin lokaci. Primary (dutse mara komai) vs. secondary (bayan tashin hankali).
hausa.variety_of_life_species_richness_count: Bambancin rayuwa. Species richness (adadi) + evenness (rarrabawa). Biodiversity mai girma → ecosystem resilience.
hausa.background_rate_1_species_per_million_: Background rate ~species 1 ga miliyan shekara. Adadin yanzu 100-1000× na background saboda mutane.
hausa.major_life_zone_defined_by_climate_veg: Babban yankin rayuwa da yanayi + tsirrai ke bayyanawa. Tropical rainforest, hamada, tundra, savanna, da sauransu.
hausa.n_nh_fixation_no_no_nitrification_orga: N₂ → NH₃ (fixation) → NO₂⁻ → NO₃⁻ (nitrification) → organic N → baya N₂ (denitrification).
hausa.co_photosynthesis_organic_c_respiratio: CO₂ ↔ photosynthesis ↔ organic C ↔ respiration. Fossil fuel yana mayar da C da aka binne na dogon lokaci zuwa sararin samaniya.
hausa.evaporation_condensation_precipitation: Ƙafewa → taruwa → ruwan sama → gudu/ruwan ƙasa → baya cikin teku.
hausa.movement_of_elements_c_n_p_s_through_b: Motsi na abubuwa (C, N, P, S) ta biotic + abiotic compartment.
hausa.each_chosen_for_properties_that_make_b: An zaɓi kowanne saboda halaye da ke sa biology ya zama mai sarrafawa — girma, fast life cycle, sauƙin girma, genetic tool.
hausa.heat_separates_double_stranded_dna_int: Zafi yana raba double-stranded DNA zuwa single strand. Hydrogen bond suna karyewa.
hausa.primers_short_dna_sequences_bind_to_co: Primer (short DNA sequence) suna haɗuwa da yankin cikawa na kowane template strand.
hausa.dna_polymerase_taq_from_thermus_aquati: DNA polymerase (Taq — daga Thermus aquaticus) yana extend primer kuma yana synthesize sabon DNA.
hausa.each_cycle_doubles_target_dna_30_cycle: Kowane zagaye yana ninka target DNA. zagaye 30 → ~10⁹-fold amplification.
hausa.kary_mullis_invented_pcr_1983_won_nobe: Kary Mullis ya ƙirƙiri PCR (1983); ya lashe Nobel a 1993.
hausa.from_thermophilic_bacterium_in_hot_spr: Daga thermophilic bacterium a maɓuɓɓugar ruwan zafi. Yana tsira daga denaturation step na 95 °C.
hausa.fluorescent_dyes_report_on_amplificati: Fluorescent dye suna ba da rahoto game da amplification a real-time. Ana amfani da su don COVID test, gene expression.
hausa.reverse_transcription_pcr_converts_rna: Reverse transcription PCR. Yana canza RNA zuwa cDNA da farko. Ana amfani da shi don RNA virus (COVID, HIV, mura).
hausa.partitions_sample_into_thousands_of_dr: Yana raba sample zuwa dubban droplet. Yana ƙidaya kasancewa/rashi — quantification mai daidaito sosai.
hausa.diagnostics_forensics_gene_cloning_anc: Diagnostics, forensics, gene cloning, ancient DNA (kamar Jurassic Park; a haƙiƙa sau da yawa <miliyan shekara 1).
hausa.first_crispr_therapy_fda_approved_dec_: CRISPR therapy na farko FDA-approved (Disamba 2023). Yana gyara patient stem cell ex vivo.
hausa.crispr_engineers_t_cells_to_attack_can: CRISPR yana injiniya T cell don kai wa cancer hari. Phase I/II trial da yawa.
hausa.crispr_knockout_libraries_reveal_which: CRISPR knockout library yana bayyana wane gene ne essential ga cuta.
hausa.faster_than_traditional_knockout_mice_: Da sauri fiye da knockout mouse na gargajiya. Ana amfani da shi sosai a bincike.
hausa.disease_resistant_rice_mushrooms_that_: Shinkafa mai jurewar cuta, naman kaza mara zama launin ruwan ƙasa, alkama gluten-free (yawancin har yanzu a bincike).
hausa.spread_sterility_or_malaria_resistance: Suna yaɗa rashin haihuwa ko malaria resistance ta wild population. Field trial har yanzu mai jayayya.
hausa.he_jiankui_2018_edited_human_embryos_m: He Jiankui (2018) ya gyara human embryo → fushin moral + scientific. Yanzu an hana shi a yawancin ƙasashe.
hausa.human_body_has_10_human_cells_10_10_mi: Jikin mutum yana da ~10¹³ human cell + ~10¹³-10¹⁴ microbial cell. Kusan daidai a adadi.
hausa.500_1_000_bacterial_species_in_healthy: bacterial species 500-1,000+ a hanjin babban lafiyayye. Tare da archaea, fungi, virus.
hausa.microbiome_carries_100_more_genes_than: Microbiome yana ɗaukar gene ~100× fiye da human genome. Yana ƙara iyawa da yawa na metabolic.
hausa.gut_microbes_communicate_with_brain_vi: Gut microbe suna sadarwa da kwakwalwa ta vagus nerve, immune signal, metabolite. An haɗa da mood, hali — amma da'awa da yawa na musamman an wuce gona da iri.
hausa.broad_spectrum_antibiotics_wipe_out_co: Broad-spectrum antibiotic suna share commensal → warkewa na iya ɗaukar watanni/shekaru. Wasu shift suna dawwama.
hausa.fecal_microbiota_transplant_fmt_cures_: Fecal microbiota transplant (FMT) yana warkar da recurrent C. difficile infection a ~90% na lokuta. Sauran aikace-aikace har yanzu experimental.
hausa.varies_by_body_site_forehead_oily_domi: Yana bambanta ta body site — goshi (mai mai, Cutibacterium acnes yana mulki), hanji (anaerobe), hamata (gumin apocrine + bacteria → ƙamshin jiki).
hausa.healthy_lactobacillus_dominant_low_ph_: Lafiyayye — Lactobacillus yana mulki, pH ƙasa. Rashin daidaito → bacterial vaginosis (BV).
hausa.700_species_affects_cavities_gum_disea: ~species 700. Yana shafar ruɓewar haƙori, cutar gumi. An haɗa da cardiovascular risk.
hausa.vaginal_birth_seeds_infant_with_matern: Haihuwa ta al'aura tana seed jariri da maternal vaginal microbe; C-section da skin microbe. Ana nazarin tasiri na dogon lokaci (wasu mai jayayya).
hausa.contains_live_bacteria_prebiotics_hmos: Yana ƙunshe da live bacteria + prebiotic (HMO) da ke ciyar da gut microbe na musamman (B. infantis).
hausa.sperm_egg_fuse_diploid_zygote_forms: Sperm + egg suna haɗuwa. Diploid zygote yana samuwa.
hausa.rapid_cell_divisions_without_growth_2_: Cell division masu sauri ba tare da girma ba. Stage 2 → 4 → 8 → 16 cell.
hausa.hollow_ball_with_inner_cell_mass_futur: Ƙwallo mara komai da inner cell mass (embryo na gaba) + trophoblast (placenta na gaba).
hausa.blastocyst_attaches_to_uterine_wall: Blastocyst yana haɗuwa da bangon mahaifa.
hausa.cell_movements_form_3_germ_layers_ecto: Motsin cell yana yin germ layer 3 — ectoderm, mesoderm, endoderm.
hausa.neural_tube_forms_from_ectoderm_future: Neural tube yana samuwa daga ectoderm. Kwakwalwa ta gaba + spinal cord.
hausa.all_major_organs_begin_forming_heart_s: Dukan manyan gabobi suna fara samuwa. Zuciya tana fara bugawa ~mako 4-5.
hausa.growth_maturation_major_structures_alr: Girma + balaga. Manyan tsari sun riga sun samu.
hausa.cancer_cells_produce_their_own_growth_: Cancer cell suna samar da growth signal nasu don activate receptor a constitutively.
hausa.tumor_suppressors_p53_rb_inactivated_c: Tumor suppressor (p53, Rb) ba sa aiki → cell suna rabuwa duk da stop signal.
hausa.apoptosis_pathways_disabled_damaged_ce: Apoptosis pathway an kashe. cell da suka lalace suna rayuwa lokacin da ya kamata su mutu.
hausa.reactivate_telomerase_telomeres_mainta: Reactivate telomerase → ana kula da telomere → rabuwa mara iyaka.
hausa.tumors_recruit_blood_vessels_to_feed_g: Tumor suna ɗaukar tasoshin jini don ciyar da mass mai girma.
hausa.cells_lose_adhesion_migrate_colonize_d: cell suna rasa adhesion, suna ƙaura, suna mallaka tissue masu nisa.
hausa.warburg_effect_tumors_use_glycolysis_e: Warburg effect — tumor suna amfani da glycolysis ko da akwai oxygen.
hausa.tumors_hide_from_or_suppress_immune_su: Tumor suna ɓoyewa daga ko murƙushe immune surveillance (PD-L1 expression).
hausa.chronic_inflammation_creates_a_permiss: Ciwon kumburi na dindindin yana ƙirƙirar muhalli mai bada dama.
hausa.accumulating_mutations_chromosomal_rea: mutation masu taruwa + chromosomal rearrangement suna tafiyar da evolution.
hausa.fast_non_specific_skin_mucus_complemen: Da sauri, non-specific. Fata, mucus, complement, neutrophil, NK cell, macrophage.
hausa.slower_days_highly_specific_has_memory: A hankali (a cikin kwanaki), specific sosai, yana da memory. B cell (antibody) + T cell.
hausa.produce_antibodies_each_b_cell_makes_o: Suna samar da antibody. Kowane B cell yana yin specificity ɗaya. B cell da aka activate suna zama plasma cell.
hausa.coordinate_immune_response_hiv_target_: Suna daidaita immune response. target na HIV. Ana jagorance su daga naive zuwa specialized subset (Th1, Th2, Th17, Treg).
hausa.kill_infected_or_cancerous_cells_via_p: Suna kashe cell da suka kamu ko na cancer ta perforin + granzyme.
hausa.y_shaped_proteins_5_classes_igg_most_a: Protein masu siffar Y. class 5 — IgG (mafi yawa), IgA (mucosa), IgM (na farko), IgE (rashin lafiyar jiki + parasite), IgD (B-cell surface).
hausa.cell_surface_molecules_that_present_an: cell surface molecule da ke gabatar da antigen ga T cell. MHC I (dukan cell, viral peptide). MHC II (immune cell, extracellular peptide).
hausa.plasma_proteins_that_punch_holes_in_pa: plasma protein da ke huda ramuka a pathogen + ɗaukar phagocyte.
hausa.signaling_molecules_of_immune_system_i: signaling molecule na immune system. Interferon (antiviral), interleukin (daidaitawa), TNF (kumburi).
hausa.long_lived_b_t_cells_from_prior_exposu: B + T cell masu dogon rayuwa daga fuskantar baya. Tushen vaccine + rigakafi na rayuwa duka.
hausa.train_adaptive_immunity_without_diseas: Suna horar da adaptive immunity ba tare da cuta ba. mRNA (COVID), protein subunit, live attenuated, inactivated.
hausa.immune_system_attacks_self_type_1_diab: Immune system yana kai wa kansa hari. Type 1 diabetes, RA, MS, lupus, Hashimoto.
hausa.ige_mediated_hypersensitivity_mast_cel: IgE-mediated hypersensitivity. Mast cell suna sakin histamine.
hausa.dendrites_receive_soma_cell_body_axon_: Dendrite (karɓa), soma (cell body), axon (aikawa), terminal (sakin neurotransmitter).
hausa.all_or_none_electrical_signal_sodium_i: All-or-none electrical signal. Sodium ciki → depolarize → potassium waje → repolarize. ~1 ms. Speed — ~1 m/s (unmyelinated) zuwa ~100 m/s (myelinated).
hausa.fatty_insulation_made_by_glia_oligoden: Insulation mai kitse da glia (oligodendrocyte a CNS, Schwann cell a PNS) ke yi. Yana hanzarta conduction. Yana lalacewa a MS.
hausa.junction_between_neurons_electrical_or: junction tsakanin neuron. Electrical ko chemical (galibi). Gap ~0.02 µm.
hausa.chemical_messengers_across_synapse_exc: chemical messenger a fadin synapse. Excitatory (glutamate), inhibitory (GABA), modulatory (serotonin, dopamine).
hausa.reward_motivation_motor_control_low_in: Reward, motivation, motor control. Ƙasa a Parkinson; dysregulated a schizophrenia.
hausa.mood_sleep_appetite_ssris_target_reupt: Mood, barci, ci. SSRI suna target reuptake.
hausa.neuromuscular_junction_memory_attentio: Neuromuscular junction. Memory + attention. Ƙasa a Alzheimer.
hausa.astrocytes_support_bbb_oligodendrocyte: Astrocyte (support, BBB), oligodendrocyte (myelin a CNS), microglia (immune), ependymal cell (cerebrospinal fluid).
hausa.cerebrum_cortex_thinking_perception_ce: Cerebrum (cortex — tunani, perception), cerebellum (motor coordination), brainstem (autonomic), limbic system (motsin rai + memory).
hausa.brain_reorganizes_itself_strongest_in_: Kwakwalwa tana sake tsara kanta — mafi ƙarfi a yarinta, amma tana ci gaba a duk rayuwa. Tushen learning.
hausa.tight_junctions_between_brain_capillar: tight junction tsakanin brain capillary cell suna riƙe yawancin molecule a waje. Babban ƙalubale ga drug delivery zuwa CNS.
hausa.20_of_body_s_energy_at_rest_despite_be: ~20% na kuzarin jiki lokacin hutu (duk da kasancewa ~2% na mass). Galibi ga Na+/K+ pump da ke kula da ion gradient.
hausa.first_mass_produced_human_protein_made: Protein na farko na mutum da aka samar da yawa. An yi shi a E. coli (1982). Ya maye gurbin insulin na alade + saniya.
hausa.single_target_therapies_humira_autoimm: Single-target therapy. Humira (autoimmune), Herceptin (HER2+ breast cancer), Keytruda (immunotherapy).
hausa.covid_19_vaccines_pfizer_moderna_self_: COVID-19 vaccine (Pfizer, Moderna). Self-amplifying version + non-COVID application a ci gaba.
hausa.replace_defective_genes_luxturna_inher: Suna maye gurbin gene masu lahani. Luxturna (makanta na gado, FDA 2017). Zolgensma (SMA, 2019).
hausa.engineered_immune_cells_yescarta_kymri: immune cell da aka injiniya. Yescarta + Kymriah don blood cancer. ~$400,000 ga kowace dose.
hausa.bone_marrow_transplants_standard_for_d: Bone marrow transplant standard ne shekaru. newer iPSC + ESC approach a bincike.
hausa.print_tissue_with_living_cells_scaffol: Print tissue da living cell + scaffold. Fata, cartilage, koda. Cikakkun gabobi har yanzu suna nesa.
hausa.engineer_biological_systems_bacteria_t: Injiniya biological system. Bacteria masu samar da magani, yeast mai samar da opioid, algal biofuel.
hausa.bt_corn_insect_resistance_roundup_read: Bt corn (insect resistance), Roundup Ready (herbicide), Golden Rice (vitamin A).
hausa.str_profiling_mtdna_degraded_samples_y: STR profiling, mtDNA (sample da suka lalace), Y chromosome (layin uba). Kwatancin database.
hausa.snp_arrays_23andme_ancestrydna_reveals: SNP array (23andMe, AncestryDNA). Suna bayyana biogeographic ancestry + dangin DNA.
hausa.detect_cancer_dna_in_blood_earlier_dia: Detect cancer DNA a jini. Ganewa da wuri, treatment monitoring.
hausa.treat_solid_tumors_til_therapy_iovance: Magance solid tumor. TIL therapy (Iovance, melanoma) FDA-approved a 2024.
hausa.engineered_microbes_clean_up_oil_spill: Microbe da aka injiniya suna tsaftace zubar mai, gurɓatar filastik, ƙarafa masu nauyi.
hausa.amplifies_specific_dna_sequences_a_bil: Yana ƙara DNA sequence na musamman sau biliyan. workhorse na molecular biology, diagnostics, forensics.
hausa.originally_a_bacterial_immune_system_n: Asali bacterial immune system, yanzu programmable gene-editing tool. Doudna + Charpentier sun raba Nobel 2020.
hausa.viruses_are_non_living_infectious_agen: Virus non-living infectious agent ne — suna buƙatar host cell don ninkawa. Ana rarraba su ta genome type (Baltimore classification), envelope, siffa.
hausa.microbiome_science_is_advancing_fast_m: Microbiome science yana ci gaba da sauri. Da'awa da yawa masu shahara (probiotic strain na musamman da ke "warkar da" yanayi na musamman) suna gaban shaida. Ka manne da sakamakon da aka sake haifar da ƙarfi.
hausa.germ_layers_what_each_forms: Germ layer — me kowanne ke yi
hausa.defined_by_hanahan_weinberg_2000_updat: Hanahan + Weinberg (2000, sabuntawa 2011) sun bayyana. Yawancin cancer suna samun yawancin alamu. Therapy yana target alamu na musamman fiye da da.
